offer: For restaurant purchasing managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual matching causes late orders and supplier penalties. We automate invoice matching instead of manual matching using spreadsheets.

Indie Hackers discussions on invoice workflows
DM outreach to restaurant purchasing managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among purchasing managers
try_it: Let users try manual entry of invoice data and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
